## Summary

## Testing
- [ ] Rule-based mode tested
- [ ] User-owned API-key mode tested where relevant
- [ ] Relevant UI languages tested
- [ ] Relevant voices/accents tested
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included

## Rights and dependencies
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution
- [ ] No unlicensed content was added
- [ ] New dependencies are documented with source and license
- [ ] Existing notices are preserved
